validation.numberPrecision: {{#label}} must have {{#limit}} or fewer decimal places

errors.title: There is a problem
errors.optionsMismatch: Options are different because you changed a previous answer

question.paymentCancelledBody: Your payment details were deleted because the form was inactive for 5 days.

summary.title: Check your answers before sending your form
summary.paymentSuccessBody: Your payment is on hold. We will charge you when you submit the form.
summary.submissionFailed: There was a problem and your form was not submitted. Try submitting the form again
summary.submissionFailedContactSuffix: or you can [[contactUsLink]] and quote your reference number to arrange a refund

repeater.removeAnswer: Are you sure you want to remove this answer?
repeater.lastItemCannotBeRemoved: Last list item cannot be removed
repeater.itemToRemoveNotFound: List item to remove not found
repeater.tooMany_one: You can only add up to [[count]] answer
repeater.tooMany_other: You can only add up to [[count]] answers
repeater.tooFew_one: You must add at least [[count]] answer
repeater.tooFew_other: You must add at least [[count]] answers

fileUpload.maxFilesReached: You have reached the maximum number of files. Please remove a file to upload more.

exit.body: Your form progress has been saved. You can return to complete your application at any time using the link provided.

confirmation.feedbackLink: What do you think of this service? (takes 30 seconds)

warnMissingNotificationEmail.body: If you want to receive a test email, [[link]] you want form submissions to go to.
warnMissingNotificationEmail.linkText: enter the email address (opens in new tab)

postcodeLookup.noAddressFoundBody: We could not find an address that matches

validation.invalidPostcode: Enter a valid postcode or enter an address manually

validation.dateMin: {{#title}} must be the same as or after {{#limit}}
validation.dateMax: {{#title}} must be the same as or before {{#limit}}

latLongField.precision: {{#label}} must have no more than 7 decimal places
latLongField.latitudeBase: Enter a valid latitude for [[fieldLabel]] like 51.519450
latLongField.longitudeBase: Enter a valid longitude for [[fieldLabel]] like -0.127758
latLongField.latitudeRange: Latitude for [[fieldLabel]] must be between [[min]] and [[max]]
latLongField.longitudeRange: Longitude for [[fieldLabel]] must be between [[min]] and [[max]]

eastingNorthingField.eastingDigits: {{#label}} for [[fieldLabel]] must be between 1 and 6 digits
eastingNorthingField.northingDigits: {{#label}} for [[fieldLabel]] must be between 1 and 7 digits

nationalGridField.pattern: Enter a valid National Grid field number for {{lowerFirst(#title)}} like NG 1234 5678

osGridRefField.pattern: Enter a valid OS grid reference for {{lowerFirst(#title)}} like TQ123456

declarationField.defaultConfirmationLabel: I confirm that I understand and accept this declaration

validation.declarationRequired: You must confirm you understand and agree with the {{lowerFirst(#label)}} to continue

paymentField.pendingTransaction: You may see a pending transaction in your bank account but you will only be charged when you submit the form.
paymentField.cannotTakePayment: There is a problem and we cannot take a payment. Contact us (details in the footer of this form) or save your progress and return to the form later.
paymentField.testApiKey: Add a valid test API key before you can preview the payment journey.
paymentField.paymentExpired: Your payment authorisation has expired. Please add your payment details again.
paymentField.submissionFailed: There was a problem and your form was not submitted. Try submitting the form again.
paymentField.canSubmitAfterPayment: You can submit the form after you have added your payment details.
paymentField.preAuthorisedTitle: You have already authorised a payment for this form
paymentField.preAuthorisedBody: Continue to submit the form. You will not be charged twice.
paymentField.paymentAmountMismatch: The pre-authorised payment amount is somehow different from that requested. Try adding payment details again.

fileUploadField.uploadFailed: There was a problem with your uploaded files. Re-upload them before submitting the form again.
